name: Overview
description: Performance, sales, and daily store health.

description: Tenant settings, plan, domain, contact, and theme.

name: Products
description: Catalog management with images, stock, and pricing.

name: Categories
description: Category structure and storefront browsing.

name: Orders
description: Fulfillment, statuses, and customer order activity.

name: Coupons
description: Discount campaigns for mid and pro stores.

name: Reviews
description: Approve, reject, and moderate customer product reviews.

name: Questions
description: Answer product questions before showing them publicly.

name: Reports
description: Sales, profit, and best-selling product insights.

name: Payments
description: COD, bank transfer, and payment status review.

name: Shipping
description: Delivery methods and customer checkout fees.

name: Delivery
description: Delivery zones, proof of delivery, failed delivery, and courier setup.

name: Returns
description: Return, exchange, approval, rejection, and refund workflow.

name: Invoices
description: Invoice sequence, credit notes, tax records, and printable accounting sheets.

name: Marketing
description: Storefront banners, hero content, and promotional notices.

name: Newsletter
description: Newsletter subscribers and subscription health.

name: Communications
description: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and notification integration settings.

name: Support
description: Customer support tickets and post-purchase communication.

name: Analytics
description: Conversion, cart abandonment, repeat customers, AOV, and revenue channels.

name: Inventory
description: Low-stock monitoring and inventory movement logs.

name: Branches
description: Multi-branch configuration for pro stores.

name: Staff
description: Admin, manager, and staff user access.

name: Audit Logs
description: Admin activity and platform change history.
